flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Elizabeth City State University rose 97% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.3k → $6.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Elizabeth City State University rose 44% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.3k → $10.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Elizabeth City State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Elizabeth City State University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (19.7% → 23.6%).
